Uses of Package
com.mimecast.robin.queue

Packages that use com.mimecast.robin.queue
Package
Description
com.mimecast.robin.endpoints
HTTP endpoints for service monitoring and metrics.
com.mimecast.robin.main
The entry point and core components of the Robin application.
com.mimecast.robin.queue
A persistent scheduled work queue for emails that could not be delivered.
com.mimecast.robin.queue.bounce
Generation of bounce messages for failed email deliveries.
com.mimecast.robin.queue.relay
Relaying of emails from the persistent queue.

    Class
    Description
    InMemoryQueueDatabase.IndexKey
     
    PersistentQueue
    Persistent queue facade for relay sessions and queue administration.
    QueueDatabase
    Contract for a scheduled work queue with claim/ack semantics.
    QueueItem
    Persistent queue item with scheduling and claim metadata.
    QueueItemState
    Queue item lifecycle states.
    QueueListFilter
    Queue listing filter.
    QueueMutation
    One queue-state mutation produced by a dequeue worker.
    QueueMutationBatch
    Batch of queue mutations plus newly derived queue items.
    QueueMutationBatch.Builder
     
    QueueMutationType
    Mutation types applied after dequeue workers finish processing.
    QueuePage
    Paged queue listing.
    QueueStats
    Aggregate queue statistics.
    RelayDeliveryResult
    Data class to hold delivery result information for relay sessions.
    RelayQueueWorkResult
    Result returned by one dequeue worker, applied later by the queue committer.
    RelaySession
    Relay session.
    SQLQueueDatabase
    SQL-backed scheduled work queue.
